modules.name: Async
modules.description: Run concurrent tasks with parallel execution, racing, timeouts, and delays.

functions.name: parallel!
functions.description: Run a list of thunks concurrently and collect all results.

functions.name: race!
functions.description: Run a list of thunks concurrently and return the first result.

functions.name: scatter_gather!
functions.description: Run thunks concurrently, then apply a gather function to the results.

functions.name: delay!
functions.description: Wait the given milliseconds, then execute the thunk.

functions.name: interval!
functions.description: Repeatedly execute a thunk at the given interval in milliseconds.

functions.name: timeout!
functions.description: Run a thunk with a timeout in milliseconds, returning Err on expiry.

modules.name: Channel
modules.description: Send and receive messages between concurrent tasks using bounded channels.

functions.name: bounded
functions.description: Create a bounded channel with the given capacity, returning a sender/receiver pair.

functions.name: send!
functions.description: Send a value into the channel, blocking if the buffer is full.

functions.name: recv!
functions.description: Receive a value from the channel, returning None if closed.

functions.name: close!
functions.description: Close the channel so no more values can be sent.

modules.name: Console
modules.description: Print output to the terminal, read user input, and write errors to stderr.

functions.name: println!
functions.description: Print a string to stdout followed by a newline.

functions.name: print!
functions.description: Print a string to stdout without a trailing newline.

functions.name: error!
functions.description: Print a string to stderr.

functions.name: read_line!
functions.description: Read a line of input from stdin.

modules.name: Crypto
modules.description: Hash data, compute HMACs, and perform constant-time comparisons.

functions.name: sha256
functions.description: Compute the SHA-256 hash of a string.

functions.name: hmac_sha256
functions.description: Compute an HMAC-SHA256 signature.

functions.name: constant_time_eq
functions.description: Compare two strings in constant time to prevent timing attacks.

modules.name: DateTime
modules.description: Parse, format, and manipulate dates and times.

functions.name: now!
functions.description: Return the current date and time as a Unix timestamp.

functions.name: parse
functions.description: Parse a date string into a Unix timestamp.

functions.name: to_string
functions.description: Format a Unix timestamp as an ISO 8601 string.

functions.name: add
functions.description: Add a duration in seconds to a timestamp.

functions.name: diff
functions.description: Calculate the difference in seconds between two timestamps.

modules.name: Env
modules.description: Read configuration from environment variables and access program arguments.

functions.name: get!
functions.description: Read an environment variable, returning None if unset.

functions.name: set!
functions.description: Set an environment variable.

functions.name: args!
functions.description: Return the program's command-line arguments as a list of strings.

modules.name: Float
modules.description: Convert between integers and floating-point numbers and format float output.

functions.name: from_int
functions.description: Convert an integer to a floating-point number.

functions.name: format
functions.description: Format a float to a string with the given number of decimal places.

modules.name: Fs
modules.description: Read files, write data to disk, and list directory contents.

functions.name: read!
functions.description: Read a file's contents as a string.

functions.name: write!
functions.description: Write a string to a file, creating or overwriting it.

functions.name: exists!
functions.description: Check if a file path exists.

functions.name: read_file!
functions.description: Read a file's contents as a string (alias for read!).

functions.name: write_file!
functions.description: Write a string to a file, creating or overwriting it (alias for write!).

functions.name: list_dir!
functions.description: List the entries in a directory.

modules.name: Http
modules.description: Make outbound HTTP requests with tracked effects.

functions.name: get!
functions.description: Send an HTTP GET request to a URL.

functions.name: post!
functions.description: Send an HTTP POST request with a body.

functions.name: put!
functions.description: Send an HTTP PUT request with a body.

functions.name: delete!
functions.description: Send an HTTP DELETE request to a URL.

functions.name: request!
functions.description: Send a custom HTTP request with full control over method, headers, and body.
functions.example: let resp = Http.request!({ method: "PATCH", url: "/api", body: data })

modules.name: HttpError
modules.description: Create structured HTTP error values for use with error middleware and the ? operator.

functions.name: bad_request
functions.description: Create a 400 Bad Request error.

functions.name: unauthorized
functions.description: Create a 401 Unauthorized error.

functions.name: forbidden
functions.description: Create a 403 Forbidden error.

functions.name: not_found
functions.description: Create a 404 Not Found error.

functions.name: method_not_allowed
functions.description: Create a 405 Method Not Allowed error.

functions.name: conflict
functions.description: Create a 409 Conflict error.

functions.name: unprocessable
functions.description: Create a 422 Unprocessable Entity error.

functions.name: too_many_requests
functions.description: Create a 429 Too Many Requests error.

functions.name: internal
functions.description: Create a 500 Internal Server Error.

functions.name: bad_gateway
functions.description: Create a 502 Bad Gateway error.

functions.name: service_unavailable
functions.description: Create a 503 Service Unavailable error.

functions.name: gateway_timeout
functions.description: Create a 504 Gateway Timeout error.

functions.name: with_context
functions.description: Add a context string to an existing HttpError.

functions.name: with_code
functions.description: Attach an application-specific error code to an HttpError.

functions.name: to_response
functions.description: Convert an HttpError to an HTTP Response record.

modules.name: Int
modules.description: Parse integers from strings, convert between numeric types, and format numbers as text.

functions.name: to_string
functions.description: Convert an integer to its string representation.

functions.name: parse
functions.description: Parse a string as an integer.

functions.name: from_float
functions.description: Truncate a floating-point number to an integer.

modules.name: Json
modules.description: Decode JSON from APIs, encode data structures to JSON, and transform key casing.

functions.name: parse
functions.description: Parse a JSON string into a value.

functions.name: to_string
functions.description: Serialize a value to a compact JSON string.

functions.name: to_string_pretty
functions.description: Serialize a value to a pretty-printed JSON string.

functions.name: to_camel_case
functions.description: Recursively convert all record keys to camelCase.

functions.name: to_snake_case
functions.description: Recursively convert all record keys to snake_case.

modules.name: Jwt
modules.description: Sign, verify, and decode JSON Web Tokens using HMAC-SHA256.

functions.name: sign
functions.description: Sign a claims record as a JWT using HS256.

functions.name: sign_with
functions.signature: fn sign_with(Record, String, { expires_in: Int }) -> String
functions.description: Sign a JWT with options like expiration time in seconds.

functions.name: verify
functions.description: Verify a JWT signature and check expiration, returning the claims.

functions.name: decode
functions.description: Decode a JWT payload without verifying the signature.

modules.name: List
modules.description: Transform collections with map and filter, reduce values with fold, and search for elements.

functions.name: length
functions.description: Return the number of elements in a list.

functions.name: head
functions.description: Return the first element, or None if the list is empty.

functions.name: tail
functions.description: Return all elements except the first.

functions.name: get
functions.description: Return the element at an index, or None if out of bounds.

functions.name: get_or
functions.description: Return the element at an index, or a default if out of bounds.

functions.name: set
functions.description: Return a new list with the element at the given index replaced.

functions.name: slice
functions.description: Return a sub-list from start index to end index (exclusive).

functions.name: fill
functions.description: Create a list of the given size filled with a single value.

functions.name: reverse
functions.description: Return the list in reverse order.

functions.name: sort
functions.description: Return the list sorted in ascending order.

functions.name: concat
functions.description: Concatenate two lists.

functions.name: contains
functions.description: Check if a list contains a given element.

functions.name: map
functions.description: Apply a function to every element, returning a new list.

functions.name: filter
functions.description: Return elements that satisfy a predicate.

functions.name: fold
functions.signature: fn fold(List<T>, U, (U, T) -> U) -> U
functions.description: Reduce a list to a single value using an accumulator function.

functions.name: find
functions.description: Return the first element that satisfies a predicate, or None.

modules.name: Log
modules.description: Record structured events at different severity levels for debugging and monitoring.

functions.name: info!
functions.description: Log a message at info level.

functions.name: warn!
functions.description: Log a message at warning level.

functions.name: error!
functions.description: Log a message at error level.

functions.name: debug!
functions.description: Log a message at debug level.

modules.name: Map
modules.description: Store and retrieve values by key in immutable dictionaries.

functions.name: empty
functions.description: Create an empty map.

functions.name: insert
functions.signature: fn insert(Map<K, V>, K, V) -> Map<K, V>
functions.description: Insert a key-value pair, returning a new map.

functions.name: set
functions.signature: fn set(Map<K, V>, K, V) -> Map<K, V>
functions.description: Insert a key-value pair, returning a new map (alias for insert).

functions.name: get
functions.description: Look up a key, returning Some(value) or None.

functions.name: remove
functions.signature: fn remove(Map<K, V>, K) -> Map<K, V>
functions.description: Remove a key, returning a new map.

functions.name: contains
functions.description: Check if a key exists in the map.

functions.name: has
functions.description: Check if a key exists in the map (alias for contains).

functions.name: keys
functions.description: Return all keys as a list.

functions.name: values
functions.description: Return all values as a list.

functions.name: entries
functions.description: Return all key-value pairs as a list of tuples.

functions.name: len
functions.description: Return the number of entries in the map.

functions.name: size
functions.description: Return the number of entries in the map (alias for len).

functions.name: from_list
functions.description: Create a map from a list of (key, value) pairs.

modules.name: Math
modules.description: Perform common calculations including trigonometry, rounding, and exponentiation.

functions.name: abs
functions.description: Return the absolute value of a number.

functions.name: min
functions.description: Return the smaller of two numbers.

functions.name: max
functions.description: Return the larger of two numbers.

functions.name: clamp
functions.description: Constrain a value between a minimum and maximum.

functions.name: pow
functions.description: Raise a base to an exponent.

functions.name: sqrt
functions.description: Compute the square root of a number.

functions.name: sin
functions.description: Compute the sine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: cos
functions.description: Compute the cosine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: atan2
functions.description: Compute the two-argument arctangent of y and x.

functions.name: floor
functions.description: Round a number down to the nearest integer.

functions.name: ceil
functions.description: Round a number up to the nearest integer.

modules.name: Middleware
modules.description: Extract authentication credentials, configure CORS, and set up rate limiting.

functions.name: extract_bearer
functions.description: Extract a Bearer token from the Authorization header.

functions.name: extract_basic
functions.description: Extract Basic auth credentials from the Authorization header.

functions.name: cors_config
functions.description: Create a CORS configuration record with the given allowed origins.

functions.name: rate_limit_config
functions.description: Create a rate limiting configuration with max requests and window in seconds.

modules.name: Mysql
modules.description: Connect to MySQL databases, execute queries, and map rows to typed records.

functions.name: connect!
functions.description: Open a connection to a MySQL database.

functions.name: execute!
functions.description: Execute a SQL statement with parameter binding, returning rows affected.

functions.name: query!
functions.description: Run a SQL query and return matching rows.

functions.name: query_one!
functions.description: Run a SQL query and return the first row, or None.

functions.name: query_as!
functions.description: Run a query and decode each row into a typed record using a decoder.

functions.name: query_one_as!
functions.description: Run a query and decode the first row, or return None.

functions.name: query_map!
functions.description: Run a query and return rows for mapping with a callback.

modules.name: Option
modules.description: Represent values that might be missing without using null.

functions.name: unwrap
functions.description: Extract the value from Some, or panic on None.

functions.name: unwrap_or
functions.description: Extract the value from Some, or return a default.

functions.name: is_some
functions.description: Return true if the option contains a value.

functions.name: is_none
functions.description: Return true if the option is None.

functions.name: ok_or
functions.description: Convert Some(v) to Ok(v) or None to Err(default).

functions.name: map
functions.description: Apply a function to the contained value, if present.

functions.name: flat_map
functions.description: Apply a function that returns an Option, flattening the result.
functions.example: Some(5) |> Option.flat_map(|x| if x > 0 then Some(x) else None)

modules.name: Postgres
modules.description: Connect to PostgreSQL databases, execute queries, and map rows to typed records.

functions.name: connect!
functions.description: Open a connection to a PostgreSQL database.

functions.name: execute!
functions.description: Execute a SQL statement with parameter binding, returning rows affected.

functions.name: query!
functions.description: Run a SQL query and return matching rows.

functions.name: query_one!
functions.description: Run a SQL query and return the first row, or None.

functions.name: query_as!
functions.description: Run a query and decode each row into a typed record using a decoder.

functions.name: query_one_as!
functions.description: Run a query and decode the first row, or return None.

functions.name: query_map!
functions.description: Run a query and return rows for mapping with a callback.

modules.name: Random
modules.description: Generate random numbers, booleans, unique identifiers, and cryptographic bytes.

functions.name: int!
functions.description: Generate a random integer between min and max (inclusive).

functions.name: bool!
functions.description: Generate a random boolean.

functions.name: uuid!
functions.description: Generate a random UUID v4 string.

functions.name: bytes!
functions.description: Generate the given number of random bytes as a hex string (max 1024).

modules.name: Request
modules.description: Extract HTTP method, headers, path params, query params, and body from incoming requests.

functions.name: header
functions.description: Read a header value from the request.

functions.name: method
functions.description: Return the HTTP method of the request.

functions.name: body_json
functions.description: Parse the request body as JSON.

functions.name: param
functions.description: Extract a path parameter by name.

functions.name: param_int
functions.description: Extract a path parameter by name and parse it as an integer.

functions.name: query
functions.description: Read a query string parameter by name.

functions.name: query_int
functions.description: Read a query string parameter and parse it as an integer.

functions.name: decode
functions.description: Decode and validate the request body against a named type schema.

functions.name: multipart
functions.description: Parse a multipart/form-data request body into a list of part records.

modules.name: Response
modules.description: Build HTTP responses with custom status codes, headers, cookies, and JSON or text bodies.

functions.name: ok
functions.description: Create a 200 OK response with a text body.

functions.name: json
functions.description: Create a 200 OK response with a JSON body.

functions.name: created
functions.description: Create a 201 Created response.

functions.name: no_content
functions.description: Create a 204 No Content response.

functions.name: bad_request
functions.description: Create a 400 Bad Request response.

functions.name: unauthorized
functions.description: Create a 401 Unauthorized response.

functions.name: forbidden
functions.description: Create a 403 Forbidden response.

functions.name: not_found
functions.description: Create a 404 Not Found response.

functions.name: method_not_allowed
functions.description: Create a 405 Method Not Allowed response.

functions.name: conflict
functions.description: Create a 409 Conflict response.

functions.name: unprocessable
functions.description: Create a 422 Unprocessable Entity response.

functions.name: too_many_requests
functions.description: Create a 429 Too Many Requests response.

functions.name: error
functions.description: Create a 500 Internal Server Error response.

functions.name: bad_gateway
functions.description: Create a 502 Bad Gateway response.

functions.name: service_unavailable
functions.description: Create a 503 Service Unavailable response.

functions.name: gateway_timeout
functions.description: Create a 504 Gateway Timeout response.

functions.name: status
functions.description: Create a response with a custom status code and body.

functions.name: with_header
functions.description: Add a single header to a response.

functions.name: with_headers
functions.description: Add multiple headers to a response.

functions.name: set_cookie
functions.description: Set a cookie on the response with a name and value.

functions.name: redirect
functions.description: Create a 302 temporary redirect to a URL.

functions.name: redirect_permanent
functions.description: Create a 301 permanent redirect to a URL.

functions.name: redirect_temporary
functions.description: Create a 307 temporary redirect that preserves the HTTP method.

modules.name: Result
modules.description: Handle operations that can fail with explicit error values instead of exceptions.

functions.name: unwrap
functions.description: Extract the Ok value, or panic on Err.

functions.name: unwrap_or
functions.description: Extract the Ok value, or return a default.

functions.name: is_ok
functions.description: Return true if the result is Ok.

functions.name: is_err
functions.description: Return true if the result is Err.

functions.name: ensure
functions.description: Return Ok(()) if the condition is true, or Err(error) if false.

functions.name: map
functions.signature: fn map(Result<T, E>, (T) -> U) -> Result<U, E>
functions.description: Apply a function to the Ok value, if present.

functions.name: and_then
functions.signature: fn and_then(Result<T, E>, (T) -> Result<U, E>) -> Result<U, E>
functions.description: Chain a function that returns a Result, flattening the result.
functions.example: Ok(5) |> Result.and_then(|x| if x > 0 then Ok(x) else Err("negative"))

functions.name: map_err
functions.signature: fn map_err(Result<T, E>, (E) -> F) -> Result<T, F>
functions.description: Apply a function to the Err value, if present.

functions.name: context
functions.signature: fn context(Result<T, E>, String) -> Result<T, { context: String, error: E }>
functions.description: Add context to an error, wrapping it in a record.

modules.name: Router
modules.description: Define URL patterns, register handlers for HTTP methods, and organize routes into groups.

functions.name: new
functions.description: Create a new empty router.

functions.name: get
functions.description: Register a handler for GET requests at a path.

functions.name: post
functions.description: Register a handler for POST requests at a path.

functions.name: put
functions.description: Register a handler for PUT requests at a path.

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Register a handler for DELETE requests at a path.

functions.name: patch
functions.description: Register a handler for PATCH requests at a path.

functions.name: options
functions.description: Register a handler for OPTIONS requests at a path.

functions.name: head
functions.description: Register a handler for HEAD requests at a path.

functions.name: any
functions.description: Register a handler for all HTTP methods at a path.

functions.name: use
functions.description: Add middleware to the router.

functions.name: group
functions.description: Group routes under a shared path prefix.

functions.name: resources
functions.description: Register RESTful resource routes (index, show, create, update, destroy).
functions.example: router |> Router.resources("/users", { index: list_users, create: create_user })

functions.name: state
functions.description: Attach shared state to the router, accessible in handlers.

functions.name: docs_json
functions.description: Generate an OpenAPI JSON document from the router's route table.

functions.name: ws
functions.description: Register a WebSocket handler at a path.

functions.name: routes
functions.description: Return the configured route table as a list of route records.

modules.name: Row
modules.description: Extract typed values from database result rows by column name.

functions.name: string
functions.description: Extract a string column value from a row.

functions.name: int
functions.description: Extract an integer column value from a row.

functions.name: float
functions.description: Extract a float column value from a row.

functions.name: bool
functions.description: Extract a boolean column value from a row.

functions.name: optional_string
functions.description: Extract a nullable string column, returning None if NULL.

functions.name: optional_int
functions.description: Extract a nullable integer column, returning None if NULL.

functions.name: decode
functions.description: Decode an entire row into a typed record using a decoder function.

modules.name: Scope
modules.description: Spawn concurrent tasks within a structured concurrency scope.

functions.name: spawn!
functions.description: Spawn a concurrent task within a scope, returning a cell to await the result.

modules.name: Server
modules.description: Start an HTTP server listening on a specific port.

functions.name: listen!
functions.description: Start the HTTP server on the given port.

modules.name: Session
modules.description: Create, read, update, and delete server-side session data.

functions.name: create!
functions.description: Create a new session with the given data, returning the session ID.

functions.name: get!
functions.description: Retrieve session data by ID, returning None if expired or missing.

functions.name: set!
functions.description: Update a single field in an existing session.

functions.name: delete!
functions.description: Remove a session by ID.

modules.name: Set
modules.description: Store unique elements and perform operations like union, intersection, and membership testing.

functions.name: empty
functions.description: Create an empty set.

functions.name: insert
functions.description: Add an element, returning a new set.

functions.name: remove
functions.description: Remove an element, returning a new set.

functions.name: contains
functions.description: Check if an element exists in the set.

functions.name: union
functions.description: Return the union of two sets.

functions.name: intersection
functions.description: Return the intersection of two sets.

functions.name: len
functions.description: Return the number of elements in the set.

functions.name: from_list
functions.description: Create a set from a list of elements.

modules.name: Sql
modules.description: Run database migrations across any supported backend.

functions.name: migrate!
functions.description: Run SQL migration files from the given directory, returning the count applied.

modules.name: Sqlite
modules.description: Connect to SQLite databases, execute queries, and map rows to typed records.

functions.name: connect!
functions.description: Open a connection to a SQLite database file.

functions.name: execute!
functions.description: Execute a SQL statement with parameter binding, returning rows affected.

functions.name: query!
functions.description: Run a SQL query and return matching rows.
functions.example: let users = Sqlite.query!("SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = ?", ["1"])

functions.name: query_one!
functions.description: Run a SQL query and return the first row, or None.

functions.name: query_as!
functions.description: Run a query and decode each row into a typed record using a decoder.

functions.name: query_one_as!
functions.description: Run a query and decode the first row, or return None.

functions.name: query_map!
functions.description: Run a query and return rows for mapping with a callback.

modules.name: String
modules.description: Split, trim, search, replace, and convert between strings and individual characters.

functions.name: length
functions.description: Return the number of characters in a string.

functions.name: contains
functions.description: Check if a string contains a substring.

functions.name: starts_with
functions.description: Check if a string starts with a prefix.

functions.name: ends_with
functions.description: Check if a string ends with a suffix.

functions.name: to_upper
functions.description: Convert all characters to uppercase.

functions.name: to_lower
functions.description: Convert all characters to lowercase.

functions.name: trim
functions.description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace.

functions.name: reverse
functions.description: Reverse the characters in a string.

functions.name: split
functions.description: Split a string by a delimiter into a list of strings.

functions.name: join
functions.description: Join a list of strings with a separator.

functions.name: slice
functions.description: Extract a substring starting at an index for a given length.

functions.name: replace
functions.description: Replace all occurrences of a pattern with a replacement.

functions.name: replace_regex
functions.description: Replace all regex matches with a replacement string.

functions.name: matches
functions.description: Test whether a string matches a regular expression.

functions.name: find_matches
functions.description: Return all substrings matching a regular expression.

functions.name: chars
functions.description: Split a string into a list of single-character strings.

functions.name: char_at
functions.description: Return the character at a given index, or None if out of bounds.

functions.name: index_of
functions.description: Return the index of the first occurrence of a substring, or -1.

functions.name: to_int
functions.description: Parse a string as an integer.

functions.name: from_char_code
functions.description: Create a single-character string from a Unicode code point.

functions.name: char_code
functions.description: Return the Unicode code point of the first character.

modules.name: Time
modules.description: Get the current timestamp and pause execution for a specified duration.

functions.name: now!
functions.description: Return the current Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

functions.name: sleep!
functions.description: Pause execution for the given number of milliseconds.

modules.name: Validate
modules.description: Validate user input with type checks, length constraints, and value ranges.

functions.name: required
functions.description: Return Err if the value is None, otherwise Ok with the value.

functions.name: string
functions.description: Validate that the value is a string.

functions.name: int
functions.description: Validate that the value is an integer or parseable as one.

functions.name: boolean
functions.description: Validate that the value is a boolean.

functions.name: min_length
functions.signature: fn min_length(String, Int, String) -> Result<String, HttpError>
functions.description: Validate that a string has at least the given number of characters.

functions.name: max_length
functions.signature: fn max_length(String, Int, String) -> Result<String, HttpError>
functions.description: Validate that a string has at most the given number of characters.

functions.name: min
functions.signature: fn min(Int, Int, String) -> Result<Int, HttpError>
functions.description: Validate that a number is at least the given minimum.

functions.name: max
functions.signature: fn max(Int, Int, String) -> Result<Int, HttpError>
functions.description: Validate that a number is at most the given maximum.

functions.name: one_of
functions.signature: fn one_of(String, List<String>, String) -> Result<String, HttpError>
functions.description: Validate that a string value is one of the allowed options.

modules.name: Weak
modules.description: Break reference cycles with weak pointers that don't prevent garbage collection.

functions.name: downgrade
functions.description: Create a weak reference from a strong reference.

functions.name: upgrade
functions.description: Attempt to upgrade a weak reference to a strong one, returning an Option.

modules.name: Ws
modules.description: Send and receive WebSocket messages within a WebSocket handler.

functions.name: send!
functions.description: Send a text message over the WebSocket connection.

functions.name: receive!
functions.description: Block until a message is received, returning Err on connection close.

functions.name: close!
functions.description: Close the WebSocket connection.
